productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's Red Pretty as a Flower Kidswear
description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt with green ribbed collar made of 100% cotton with gathers around the neckline, flair sleeves and Daisy graphic on the front Wash care1. Machine wash in cold water with gentle cycle using mild detergent2. Wash dark colours seperately3. Do not bleach4. Do not soak or wring5. Dry inside-out6. Do not tumble dry7. Do not iron on print and studsFittingComfort FitThis spunky red Daisy Duck tee from disney is perfect for your little girl. Daisy will keep her company while she romps around in the park or runs around with her friends. The flaired sleeves and gathers around the neckline add a feminine touch, while the cotton fabric keeps your little one comfortably dry. This top looks great when teamed up with denim shorts or skirts for an enjoyable outing. Add on a pair of pretty footwear from the crocs collection available at myntra, include colourful jibbitz, and transform your little darling into a princess.
